full_text:
Hua Xin (Ziyu) 華歆 (子魚)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Xin (華歆), styledZiyu (子魚). Head of “The Dragon”, a group of three scholars. Promoted Emperor Xian’s abdication. Hua Xin was affiliated with Liu Yao, the Wu Kingdom, and the Wei Kingdom. Hua Xin lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
